# InfiniSynapse AI Workspace

This workspace is a local rule pack for AI assistants building products on top of InfiniSynapse.

## Core files

- AGENTS.md: primary cross-tool rules.
- CLAUDE.md: Claude Code entry.
- README.md: project overview.
- docs/USAGE-GUIDE.md: how to use the workspace.
- docs/SOURCE-AUDIT.md: upstream source availability and fetch attempts.
- docs/QUICK-REFERENCE.md: high-signal endpoint and deployment notes.

## Upstream docs

- upstream-docs/infinisynapse-site/zh/markdown/private-deployment-guide.md
- upstream-docs/infinisynapse-site/zh/markdown/server-api-reference.md
- upstream-docs/infinisynapse-site/zh/markdown/cli-api-reference.md
- upstream-docs/infinisynapse-site/zh/markdown/chrome-plugin-install.md
- upstream-docs/infinisynapse-site/markdown/private-deployment-guide.md
- upstream-docs/infinisynapse-site/markdown/server-api-reference.md
- upstream-docs/infinisynapse-site/markdown/cli-api-reference.md
- upstream-docs/infinisynapse-site/markdown/chrome-plugin-install.md
- upstream-docs/infinisynapse-site/html/
- upstream-docs/infinisynapse-site/assets/

## Skills

- .agents/skills/infinisynapse-deployment/SKILL.md
- .agents/skills/infinisynapse-server-api/SKILL.md
- .agents/skills/infinisynapse-cli/SKILL.md
- .agents/skills/infinisynapse-product-patterns/SKILL.md
- .agents/skills/infinisynapse-browser-extension/SKILL.md

## Tooling

- tools/sync-upstream-docs.sh: fetch official public docs and convert them to Markdown.
- tools/doctor.sh: check local workspace health and upstream source availability.
- tools/test-suite.sh: lightweight consistency tests.
